name: Mohammad Rizky Pratama
title: Quality Assurance Engineer
tagline: Building quality into every development cycle
bio: Passionate QA Engineer with 7+ years of experience in manual testing, test automation, and quality assurance processes. I specialize in building robust test frameworks, identifying critical bugs, and ensuring software products meet the highest quality standards. My approach combines technical expertise with a keen eye for user experience.
philosophy: Quality is not an act, it is a habit. I believe in shifting-left testing, continuous improvement, and collaborative development. Every bug found in development saves ten in production.
